title: Writing - Part 1: Remote Work
description: Your class has been discussing the growing trend of remote working and its effects on employees and companies.

content.question: Write an essay discussing two of the aspects in your notes. You should explain which aspect you consider most significant, giving reasons for your opinion.

opinions: Working from home allows employees to save time on commuting and manage their personal responsibilities more easily.
Some employees are more productive at home without office distractions, while others find it harder to concentrate.
Remote teams can struggle to collaborate effectively and maintain a strong company culture.

structure.introduction: Introduce the rise of remote working and its impact on the modern workplace.
structure.bodyParagraph1: Discuss the first aspect and its implications for workers.
structure.bodyParagraph2: Discuss the second aspect and argue which is more important.
structure.conclusion: Summarise your view on the overall impact of remote working.

content.modelAnswer:
Remote working has become increasingly common since the global pandemic accelerated its adoption, transforming the way millions of people work. Two of the most discussed aspects are its effects on work-life balance and team communication.

Working from home offers significant advantages for work-life balance. By eliminating daily commutes, employees save time and reduce stress, giving them more energy for family and leisure. Many workers report higher job satisfaction and improved wellbeing when they have greater control over their working environment and schedule.

However, the impact on team communication is a more complex and pressing issue. Without face-to-face interaction, colleagues can feel isolated and miscommunications become more common. Building trust, mentoring junior staff and maintaining company culture are all considerably harder when people rarely meet in person.

In conclusion, while remote working enhances work-life balance, I believe the challenges it poses to team communication are more significant. Companies should invest in tools and practices that keep remote teams connected, engaged and effectively supported.
